name: case-study-builder
description: Use when creating customer case studies from interview transcripts. Example: 'Build a case study from my customer interview notes'. Delivers structured case study with challenge/solution/results format.
author: Claude Code
anti_patterns: Generic templates without customer voice - reads like marketing fluff
Missing metrics - no proof of value delivered
Skipping the challenge context - solution seems trivial
No customer approval process - legal/relationship risk
short_circuits: Full Loop: Interview → draft → review → metrics verification → customer approval → publish
Abbreviated: Draft from existing materials + light interview → internal review → publish
Direct: Quick internal case study for sales enablement (no external publish)
quality_loop: Challenge clearly articulated with business impact
Solution describes approach, not just product features
Results quantified with specific metrics (%, $, time)

related_skills.when: General content writing needed beyond case studies
Case study needs strong conversion-focused CTAs
Breaking case study into social posts, blog, video scripts
Identifying referenceable customers for case studies
Case study needs visual design, layout, data visualization

references.purpose: Proven case study structure: Challenge → Solution → Results → Future
Questions to extract compelling customer stories
references.sections: Discovery questions, metric extraction, quote elicitation

references.purpose: Standardized metrics categories for B2B case studies

references.sections: Legal review, quote approval, brand guidelines, timeline

references.purpose: Narrative techniques for compelling business stories
references.sections: Hero's journey, data storytelling, emotional hooks
